title: centaurea degeni
intro: Centaurea degeni, also known as Degen's knapweed, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to have medicinal benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating pain. The plant is also known to have various health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, which can help protect against infections and oxidative stress. Centaurea degeni can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
